summary: Tested the new useConfirm hook migration for an offline Petrol Pump React app. Verified app loads cleanly (no critical JS errors). Grepped source: no window.confirm/window.prompt call sites remain (only comments referencing them). Installed native confirm/prompt trap during all Playwright runs — never fired. However, I could NOT reach the 'Clear All Data', 'Permanent Delete by range', or 'Pro Mode' sections inside Settings → Backup in the preview environment. After opening Settings → Backup, only 3 sections render in DOM: 'Manual Backup', 'Merge Backup Data', 'Auto Backup'. The text 'Pro Mode', 'Clear All Data', and 'Permanent Delete' are NOT present in document.body.innerText, and no [role='switch'] elements exist — so the Pro Mode toggle cannot be flipped via UI to unlock the delete sections. Multiple scroll strategies (window.scrollTo, mouse.wheel on modal, scrolling all overflow:auto containers) did not reveal more content. Settlement / CreditSales / IncomeExpenseCategories bulk-delete flows were not tested because 1) app has no seed data and 2) Settle/Inc./Exp button click also timed out (likely overlay from Settings dialog still mounted). The receipt bulk-delete modal was not exercised. Therefore the primary verification (typed-text DELETE ALL gating and Yes/No behaviour) could NOT be completed end-to-end. The hook source code itself looks correct and all migrated handlers use `await confirm(...)` properly.

ui_bugs.issue: Pro Mode toggle, Clear All Data button, and Permanent Delete by range button are not rendering in DOM when Backup tab is opened. document.body.innerText does not contain 'Pro Mode' at all. Either there's an early return, an erroring conditional above those blocks, or the sections are unmounted. This blocks verification of the typed-text confirm dialog (DELETE ALL gating) and the date-range permanent delete migration. Needs investigation by main agent — possibly the Online URL / Save URL block above throws or the proMode state initializer is failing.
Console warning repeatedly: '`DialogContent` requires a `DialogTitle` for the component to be accessible'. Not blocking, but should be fixed by adding VisuallyHidden DialogTitle.

integration_issues.flow: Pro-mode gated destructive actions (Clear All Data, Permanent Delete by range)
integration_issues.issue: Could not be reached in the preview to validate the migrated confirm() hook because the Pro Mode section itself does not render. Main agent should investigate why HeaderSettings Backup content is truncated to first 3 sections.

action_items: INVESTIGATE why Settings → Backup tab does not render Pro Mode / Clear All Data / Permanent Delete sections in the preview build. Check browser console for silent errors in HeaderSettings.jsx render path (possibly Online URL block or proMode useState initializer throws before those blocks render).

Once those sections render, retest: (a) Clear All Data → confirm-dialog must appear with typed input; Yes disabled until 'DELETE ALL' typed; Cancel dismisses. (b) Permanent Delete by range with Pro Mode OFF (set dates and click) → dialog appears. (c) Settlement / CreditSales / IncomeExpenseCategories delete flows — add a record first, then delete, verify dialog.
Add a DialogTitle (wrapped in VisuallyHidden) inside every Radix DialogContent used in the app to silence accessibility warnings.

Consider adding data-testid='settings-btn', 'backup-tab', 'pro-mode-switch', 'clear-all-data-btn', 'permanent-delete-btn', 'settle-inc-exp-btn' to make future Playwright runs deterministic — current selectors rely on fragile text matches like 'Settle/Inc./Exp' which contains special chars and times out.
critical_code_review_comments: HeaderSettings.jsx is 1854 lines — should be split into BackupPanel, ProModePanel, DangerZonePanel subcomponents; currently hard to reason about conditional gating.

Line 1052 in HeaderSettings.jsx: `const proceed = localStorageService.isProModeEnabled() || await confirm({...})`. Because the 'Permanent Delete by range' button is only rendered when `proMode` is true, this short-circuit means the confirm dialog is NEVER shown for date-range delete in practice. If the requirement is to always show confirm, drop the isProModeEnabled() guard or render the button regardless of pro-mode.
use-confirm.jsx is clean and correct. Good use of resolver ref pattern.
PaymentReceived.jsx still owns its own bulk delete modal — consider migrating to the shared hook for consistency (noted as intentional in request, but worth unifying).

success_rate.frontend: 30% — only smoke + static code verification complete; 4 of 6 delete flows not reached

test_credentials: Pro Mode password: 123456 (provided but not usable because Pro Mode toggle is not visible in preview)
seed_data_creation: None — app starts empty; was blocked from creating Settlement/CreditSales records due to Settle/Inc./Exp button selector timeout.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Key finding: in this preview build, Settings → Backup tab only renders Manual Backup / Merge Backup Data / Auto Backup. The Online URL, Pro Mode, Clear All Data, and Permanent Delete sections that exist in HeaderSettings.jsx source (lines ~820–1250) do NOT appear in the DOM. Verify this by opening the preview, clicking Settings → Backup, and inspecting document.body.innerText — 'Pro Mode' will be missing. Fix that first. After fix, testids for the new hook are: [data-testid='confirm-dialog'], [data-testid='confirm-dialog-confirm'], [data-testid='confirm-dialog-cancel'], [data-testid='confirm-dialog-typed-input']. Receipt legacy modal testids: 'bulk-delete-confirm-modal', 'bulk-delete-confirm-btn', 'bulk-delete-cancel-btn'. No window.confirm/prompt call sites remain in source (grep passes). Native window.confirm was trapped and never invoked during my tests.
rca of the issue: RCA for missing Pro Mode section: Unknown — likely an unhandled conditional or a JS error in HeaderSettings.jsx render tree above line 988 that silently aborts rendering of subsequent siblings. No pageerror was captured but console-error listener only caught DialogTitle warnings. Suggest main agent (1) set a breakpoint / temporary console.log before the Pro Mode section, (2) verify savedOnlineUrl initializer doesn't throw, (3) confirm the Dialog container isn't wrapping Backup content in a fixed-height non-scroll container (CSS layout issue). Reproduction steps: open https://data-management-hub-3.preview.emergentagent.com → click Settings → click Backup tab → observe only 3 sections. Mitigation: fix render, then retest Clear All Data typed-text flow end-to-end.
